fields.explainZh: 集群中所有活跃的主分片数。
fields.explainEn: Number of active primary shards in the cluster.

fields.explainZh: 集群中所有活跃的分片数。
fields.explainEn: Total number of active shards in the cluster.
Name of the Elasticsearch cluster.

fields.explainZh: 集群状态，分为green、yellow和red。green：所有的主分片和副本分片都正常运行;yellow：所有的主分片都正常运行，但不是所有的副本分片都正常运行。;red：有主分片没能正常运行。
fields.explainEn: Cluster status, green, yellow, or red.green: All primary shards and replica shards are running correctly.yellow: All primary shards are running correctly. Some replica shards fail to run correctly.red: Some primary shards fail to run correctly.
Number of shards being initialized.
Number of data nodes in the cluster.
Number of nodes in the cluster.

fields.explainZh: 当前节点迁往其他节点的分片数量，通常为0，当有节点加入或者退出时该值会增加。
fields.explainEn: Number of shards being relocated from the current node to another node. Typically, the value is 0. The value increases when a node is joining or leaving the cluster.
Whether a timeout timer is set.

fields.explainZh: 未分配的分片数，通常为0，当有某个节点的副本分片丢失该值就会增加。
fields.explainEn: Number of unassigned shards. Typically, the value is 0. The value increases when replica shards are missing on a specific node.
Cache Count.
Name of the Elasticsearch cluster.
Total number of documents in the cluster.
Number of cache hits.
Total number of indexes in the cluster.
Number of cache misses.
Total number of segments in the cluster.
Total data storage size in the cluster.

fields.explainZh: 文件系统可用空间大小。
fields.explainEn: Available space of the file system.
Path of data storage space.
File system type.
Mounted directory.
Node ID.
Total space of the file system.

fields.explainZh: 当前正在进行段合并数量。
fields.explainEn: Number of ongoing segment merge operations.

fields.explainZh: 参与当前正在进行段合并文档数量。
fields.explainEn: Number of documents participating in segment merge operations.

fields.explainZh: 正在进行合并的段的总大小。
fields.explainEn: Total size of segments being merged.
Node ID.
Total number of segment merge operations.

fields.explainZh: 参与段合并文档数量总计。
fields.explainEn: Total number of documents participating in segment merge operations.
Total size of segments merged.
Total time used by segment merge operations.
Number of indexed documents of the node.
Memory usage in percentage of the node.
ID of the node in the cluster.
Name of the node in the cluster.

fields.explainZh: 节点的角色分为三种，分别为master node，data node，ingest node。
fields.explainEn: Node role, which can be master node, data node, or ingest node.
Total number of segments of the node.
Address of the node.

fields.explainZh: 线程池活跃的线程数，当前在处理任务的线程数量。
fields.explainEn: Number of active threads in the thread pool, namely, the number of threads that are processing tasks.

fields.explainZh: 线程池已完成的线程数。
fields.explainEn: Number of completed threads in the thread pool.
Largest Num.
ID of the node to which the thread pool belongs.
Pool Id.
Name of the thread pool.

fields.explainZh: 线程池当前队列长度，在队列中等待处理的任务单元数量。
fields.explainEn: Current queue length of the thread pool, namely, the number of task units in the queue waiting to be processed.

fields.explainZh: 线程池拒绝的线程数，当线程池无可用线程且队列已满，那么新的请求将被拒绝，此数为累加值。
fields.explainEn: Number of rejected threads in the thread pool. The value increases when new requests are rejected because the current thread pool has no available threads and the queue is full.

fields.explainZh: 线程池包含已配置的线程数量。
fields.explainEn: Number of configured threads in the thread pool.
Node ID.
Number of times for receiving data.
Number of bytes of received data.
Number of started services on the node.
Number of times for transmitting data.
Number of bytes of transmitted data.

fields.explainZh: 测试IP对应资源的协议连接。
fields.explainEn: Test the protocol connections of the resource corresponding to an IP address.
